steps.title: Find the original median
steps.content:
The original list has $7$ values, so the median is the $4$th value when the list is ordered.
$$12,22,24,33,39,42,44$$
The median is $33$.

steps.title: Compare fourth values
steps.content: Each choice also has $7$ values, so each median is its $4$th value. The fourth values are $38$, $39$, $33$, and $28$, respectively. Only the third list has the same median. The answer is C.
